title: kladnia tristis
side_effects: Kladnia tristis can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe allergic reactions, including hives and anaphylaxis in some individuals. Prolonged consumption of its extracts can also lead to gastrointestinal issues like nausea, vomiting, and abdominal pain. In rare cases, excessive use of Kladnia tristis has been linked to liver damage and kidney problems. Furthermore, improper preparation or dosing can cause interactions with other medications, exacerbating pre-existing health conditions.
